content:
感谢各位守密人的支持！
《忘却前夜》OST：莱克 EP·狼的下周一 已发布，欢迎收听、下载及分享。
如果有基于OST的二次创作，也欢迎分享给我们！（二创请遵照同人规则，OST内容请勿商用）

**忘却前夜OST：莱克 EP·狼的下周一**
棺材里爬出的轮盘赌，雪夜里穷追不舍的过去。
开一局，再一局，狼的皮毛和好运气，会带来一个阳光明媚的下周一。

作曲：F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio
规划：B.I.A.V. Studio

——◆——◆—— ◆◆◆ ——◆——◆——

Thank you for your support!

Morimens OST: "Ryker EP· Next Lucky Monday" was released today. 
Welcome everyone to listen, download and share. If you have secondary creations based on the OST, please also share them with us!
 (Please follow the rules of the fandom for secondary creations, and do not use the OST content for commercial purposes)

**Morimens OST: Ryker EP· Next Lucky Monday**
The roulette wheel grinds its way out of the coffin; the past still hounds through the snowy night.
Game after game... The Wolf's warm pelt and good fortune will surely bring the next sunny Monday.

Composer：F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio
Planning：B.I.A.V. Studio
thread_title: 忘却前夜OST：莱克 EP·狼的下周一
